checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
CORS: open access (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
CAPTCHA detected: arkose, recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /login — simple, 2 inputs

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, chatgpt, anthropic, claude, google-extended, ccbot
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: WebPage
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1672 divs with only 134 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 394/677 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 20/20 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
No h1 heading — page lacks a clear title for agents
20 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 614/634 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS

details.allow_header: GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~1,214,528 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 0% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 31 — deeply nested structure
Reading this page costs $1.52–$18.22 per load ($7.59–$91.09 for a 5-page session)
258 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, search
All 108 images have alt attributes (108 descriptive, 0 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
8 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 64ms
Moderate payload: 536KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
